arts.ttl: Forward travelling ahead of transfer to Ipswich Town – Could be available for Liverpool visit
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Paraguayan media that Brighton & Hove Albion forward Julio Enciso is on the verge of signing for Ipswich Town. The 20-year-old has been linked with a move to the Premier League side during this window as they look to add to their squad before next month’s deadline. Christian Pérez reports The post Forward travelling ahead of transfer to Ipswich Town – Could be available for Liverpool visit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Lille, Atlético v Leverkusen, and more: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Updates from Tuesday’s Champions League matches Follow Monaco v Aston Villa with Barry Glendenning Live scores | Tables | Read Football Daily | Email John Meanwhile, in the other earlier game, Atalanta are leading Sturm Graz 1-0. That will lift them to third, though with plenty of football to be played this match day. Villa are in danger of slipping from the top eight; Monaco could go to ninth. So much to play for. Thank you, Uefa, thank you! Not going to plan for Villa in the Principality. Continue reading...
